subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Hearken unto My Call from the precincts wherein waft the fragrances of My paradise and wherein shine forth the lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسمی اسمع ندائی عن شطر الذی فیه تهب نفحات رضوانی و استضاء فیه انوار
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @spiritual transformation, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
